dj_text: Branches breaking! That Pirate Bot DJ Radio is cutting through! And that was Jedi Mind Tricks Presents: Army of the Pharaohs - "Spaz Out" [Official Audio]. Hold on — Ryge Og Knep is up!
commercial_text: We interrupt this broadcast to bring you... nothing. We just wanted your attention. Carry on.
hijack_text: Pirate Bot, this ain't just any day on my starboard side her
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: Ryge Og Knep
